claim: Flower colour is represented hierarchically as pigmentation presence and pigmented-only optical intensity.
Environment plus continuous spatial structure provides the nationwide natural predictive baseline.
claim_ceiling: predictive baseline; not complete causal partition

claim: Adding the Bombus fingerprint yields only a small mean cross-fitted AUC change (0.0061).
claim_ceiling: habitat-support fingerprint; not abundance or visitation

claim: At the prespecified 25-km pair scale, Bombus fingerprint turnover is positively associated with presence turnover (beta 0.084) and pigmented-only intensity turnover (beta 0.092); both primary-family q 0.028).
claim_ceiling: local association beyond fitted natural-map expectation; not causal selection

claim: The 16 primary local pigmented isolates are useful follow-up units but are not more frequent than the natural maps.
Local 5-km population and DID alignment point toward settlement proximity, but corrected p-values are 0.076 and 0.084.
claim_ceiling: exploratory local placement tendency; not human-mediated origin

claim: Images and public landscape layers do not demonstrate planting, horticultural origin, escape, introgression, or genetic pollution.
claim_ceiling: requires field history, specimens, and population genetics
